data.title: validate.sh: CMD_LINT routing adds unused PID vars -> dead code in parallel dispatch block
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: LINT_PID, RUFF_PID, and MYPY_PID are assigned but never explicitly waited on. The top-level bare 'wait' covers all background children, so this is functionally harmless, but the unused variables add noise.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh
Category: hygiene

## Expected Behavior
PID variables are either used explicitly (wait "$LINT_PID") or not assigned at all.

## Actual Behavior
LINT_PID/RUFF_PID/MYPY_PID are assigned but never referenced after assignment.
